message.content: @startuml title Package Vod Detail participant "PackageVodDetail" as PVD participant "VodProductManager" as VPM box STB #LightGray participant "" as MBS2 end box database "MBS" as DB PVD ->+ DB : get package vod detail infos\nrow DB -->- PVD :package vod detail infos activate PVD note over PVD,VPM,MBS,DB: When entering the single package detail\ntable {Function;Interface;;get package vod detail infos ;get package vod detail (GET /service/packagedetail); row} PVD->> +VPM:getProductButtons(productList) return product buttons opt getting Push for vod purchased note right of PVD:MBS sends push message to \nSTB via socket communication.\nThe content includes offer id,\npurchased time etc. activate PVD table{ Function;value ;;purchasePush;offer id;row } db <-[#red] -[hidden]-o [#blue]: purchasePush(offerId)\nnote left:#green;line:green;text:green:**When vod is purchased.** Getting push message from MBS opt [vod product contains offerId]\nPVD requests again PVD ->+ DB : get package vod detail infos\nrow return package vod detail infos PVD->>+VPM:getProductButtons(productList) return product buttons end deactivate PVD alt user discount exists in response rect rgb(190, 86, 74){#white title User Discount Info Table Example:\ndiscountType|discountValue|\ncash coupon|$5 off |\nmembership point|-3 pts | link https://www.example.com/discounts [[Discounts]] group Discounts Available rectangle "$$" <> **$** $$<> Cash Back Offer!$$\u20AC\uFFFD Euro Symbol Here!" ##palegoldenrod## :CashBackOffer(){}###ENDGROUP####STARTCOLOR=yellowGREENFONT_SIZE+=boldITALIC_UNDERLINE_STRIKE_THROUGH_OUTLINED_SHADOWED_ANGLED_BRACKETS_CURLY_SQUARE_PARENTHESIS_LESS_THAN_GREATER_THAN_EQUAL_TO_NOT_EQUALS_APPROXIMATELY_INFINITY_PERCENTAGE_DEGREE_MINUTE_SECOND_MICRO_NANO_MILLI_KILO_ME_GIGA_TERA
